title: How can I get a Date column to only be able to select a particular day of the week like only Tuesdays?
excerpt: We would like a board that only allows a date column to show a particular day of the week like only Tuesdays to be selected by a participant/user. Is this possible? If so, how would we go about creating that functionalit…

posts.author: DWilson (Deanne Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like a board that only allows a date column to show a particular day of the week like only Tuesdays to be selected by a participant/user. Is this possible? If so, how would we go about creating that functionality? Thank you in advance.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DWilson

There isn’t anything direct like that but a couple of potential work arounds come to mind. Let me know if you wanted to chat about it and work it out together.
